situational_context: Running comeback week 3: 4 runs completed since May 3 (2.47, 2.01, 3.53, 5.01 km). Run #4 (May 18) was aggressive at +43% distance; consolidation needed before further progression. Primary modality remains eBike commuting (~38 km/day on-site). Chronic load declining to 20.9 (was 22.3 on May 14), training status: Detraining. ACWR 0.78 — below safe zone lower bound, rebuild bias. HRV 7d avg 35.7 (at 90d baseline 36.4, BALANCED). RHR stable at 50.4. VO2max running improved to 38.7. Weight declining: 103.6 kg (from 104.1). Sleep slightly degraded at 6.92h 7d avg (baby-related). Next 3 sessions planned: velo Z2 Friday (conges), Run #5 consolidation Saturday, velo Z2 Sunday. Vitamin D retest due ~July 2026.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Repos (Run #6 possible si Run #5 sans douleur, gap ≥4j)

recommendations.text: Run #5 Saturday: consolidate at ≤5 km Z1-Z2. Do NOT increase distance — Run #4's +43% jump needs a stabilization run at the same distance. Walk if HR >145. Post-run tissue check: any localized pain >24h → skip next run.
recommendations.measurable: Run #5 completed ≤5 km, avg HR ≤145, no post-run pain >24h

recommendations.text: Protect sleep quantity this weekend — 7d avg has dropped to 6.92h from 7.23h. Target ≥7.5h Friday and Saturday nights to rebuild the buffer before next sur-site week.

Continue eccentric calf raises ≥3x/week. At 103.6 kg with running volume increasing, Achilles load management is the primary injury-prevention lever. Heavy slow resistance (Beyer 2015) protocol preferred.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized pain >24h after Run #5 → skip next run
markers_to_watch.reason: Run #4 was an aggressive +43% distance jump at 103.6 kg; tissue tolerance is the bottleneck

markers_to_watch.threshold: Should stabilize near 20 then start rising with 3-session weeks
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently declining (22.3 → 20.9) despite active training — need consistent session cadence to reverse

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if drops below 6.5h for 3+ consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 6.92h, down from 7.23h — approaching the zone where recovery is compromised
